summary.productInsights: key learnings consolidated for onboarding conversion, training adherence and nutrition adoption across ES/EN users
summary.operationsInsights: operational learnings consolidated from support SLA, sync stability and self-service coverage by role
summary.residualRiskModel: residual risks prioritized by severity and probability with owners and mitigation deadlines

recommendedActions: reduce onboarding friction in profile and consent transitions
strengthen first-session guidance in home/today experience
expand contextual nutrition nudges by goal and language

signals: p1 escalations concentrated in auth/session incidents
self-service deflects repetitive tickets when runbooks are role-specific
sync/backoff visibility reduces support handling time
recommendedActions: improve auth incident runbook with faster first-response checks
increase KB discoverability in admin and coach workflows
keep sync diagnostics visible in runtime and support console

residualRisks.title: session instability under peak load
residualRisks.mitigation: token refresh hardening and proactive alerting

residualRisks.title: incomplete role parity in self-service docs
residualRisks.mitigation: role-based KB expansion and monthly audit

residualRisks.title: regression escape in cross-platform edge paths
residualRisks.mitigation: expand weekly critical suite and triage SLA
